1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
2.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
2.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

2.gl: properly, a goal, i.e. the bright object at adistance travelled towards; hence (figuratively), splendor, or (subjectively) truthfulness, or (objectively) confidence; but usually (adverbially), continually (i.e. to the mo
2.kj: alway(-s), constantly, end, ([phrase] n-) ever(more), perpetual, strength, victory.

2.gl: where?; hence, whither?, when?; also hither and thither
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: to hide (by covering), literally or figuratively
2.kj: be absent, keep close, conceal, hide (self), (keep) secret, [idiom] surely.

2.gl: to mislay, i.e. to be oblivious of, from want of memory or attention

3.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
3.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

3.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
3.kj: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) lou

3.gl: the heart (as the most interior organ);
3.kj: [phrase] bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, [idiom] unawares, understanding.
3.dv: from H3823 (לָבַב); used also like H3820 (לֵב)

3.gl: to place (in a very wide application)
3.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

3.gl: where?; hence, whither?, when?; also hither and thither
advice; by implication, plan; also prudence

4.gl: an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)

4.gl: properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce
4.kj: give account, afflict (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), (cause to, give) answer, bring low (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), cry, hear, Leannoth, lift up, say, [idiom] scholar, (give a

4.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
4.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

4.gl: properly, to be slack or languid, i.e. (by implication) sleep (figuratively, to die); also to grow old, stale or inveterate
to be (causative, make) luminous (literally and metaphorically)
4.kj: [idiom] break of day, glorious, kindle, (be, en-, give, show) light (-en, -ened), set on fire, shine.

4.gl: to scan, i.e. look intently at; by implication, to regard with pleasure, favor or care
4.kj: (cause to) behold, consider, look (down), regard, have respect, see.

5.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

5.gl: narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)
5.kj: adversary, afflicted(-tion), anguish, close, distress, enemy, flint, foe, narrow, small, sorrow, strait, tribulation, trouble.
5.dv: or צָר; from H6887 (צָרַר); compare as in H6864 (צֹר)

5.gl: to be able, literally (can, could) or morally (may, might)
5.kj: be able, any at all (ways), attain, can (away with, (-not)), could, endure, might, overcome, have power, prevail, still, suffer.

5.gl: to waver; by implication, to slip, shake, fall
5.kj: be carried, cast, be out of course, be fallen in decay, [idiom] exceedingly, fall(-ing down), be (re-) moved, be ready, shake, slide, slip.

5.gl: properly, to spin round (under the influence of any violent emotion), i.e. usually rejoice, or (as cringing) fear
5.kj: be glad, joy, be joyful, rejoice.
5.dv: or (by permutation) גּוּל; a primitive root;

5.gl: properly, removal; used only (in the construction) adverb as conjunction, lest

6.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
6.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

6.gl: figuratively, to trust, be confident or sure
6.kj: be bold (confident, secure, sure), careless (one, woman), put confidence, (make to) hope, (put, make to) trust.
6.dv: a primitive root; properly, to hide for refuge (but not so precipitately as H2620 (חָסָה));

6.gl: to treat a person (well or ill), i.e. benefit or requite; by implication (of toil), to ripen, i.e. (specifically) to wean
6.kj: bestow on, deal bountifully, do (good), recompense, requite, reward, ripen, [phrase] serve, mean, yield.

6.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
6.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.
behold (by mistake for H7789 (שׁוּר)), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman).
6.dv: or (the original form) שׁוּר; (1 Samuel 18:6), a primitive root (rather identical with H7788 (שׁוּר) through the idea of strolling minstrelsy);

6.gl: something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity
6.kj: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.
